sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106953" key="u(pargureu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπαργυρ-εύω</orth>, dub. sens., perh. <sense id="n106953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use base money,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.832a</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
